evals.name: lunar-rover-assessment
evals.prompt: Run a full systems assessment for a Lunar Rover. Use the thermal requirements in `skills/requirements-manager/evals/test-requirements/thermal.md` as context. Assume a 200kg launch capacity and an S-band downlink to Earth.
evals.expected_output: An assessment report containing mass, power, and link budgets with a specific mention of surviving the -170C lunar night and 20W heater limit.
